full_text:
Song Yi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Song Yiwas born in Taiyuan. His presence nearby prevented Wang Yun’s death but obeyed recall and was powerless. Song Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Song Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
